headline: MAS Q1 Deep Dive: Volume Gains, Cost Actions, and Product Expansion Drive Outperformance
summary: Home-building design and manufacturing company Masco Corporation (NYSE:MAS) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 6.5% year on year to $1.92 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.04 per share was 18.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: A Look At Masco’s Valuation As Q1 Beat, Buybacks And Leadership Changes Signal Ongoing Confidence
summary: Masco (MAS) just delivered a Q1 2026 earnings and revenue beat, kept its full year guidance intact, and coupled that with leadership changes and a higher share repurchase target. See our latest analysis for Masco. The earnings beat, higher repurchase target, and renewed focus on bolt on M&A have coincided with very strong momentum, with a 1 day share price return of 10.78% and a 30 day share price return of 23.10%.
